title: Healthy Vegetable Lasagna with Ricotta
description: A nutritious twist on classic lasagna, packed with fresh vegetables, creamy ricotta, and protein-rich layers. This wholesome recipe delivers comfort food satisfaction while keeping your health goals on track.
content_html:
Ingredients

For the Vegetable Filling:

  • 2 medium zucchini, diced
  • 1 large eggplant, cubed
  • 2 cups fresh spinach
  • 1 red bell pepper, chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 tbsp olive oil
  • 1 tsp Italian seasoning
  • Salt and pepper to taste

For the Cheese Layer:

  • 15 oz ricotta cheese (part-skim)
  • 1 cup cottage cheese
  • 1 large egg
  • 1/4 cup fresh basil, chopped
  • 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, grated

Additional Layers:

  • 9 whole wheat lasagna noodles
  • 3 cups marinara sauce (low-sodium)
  • 2 cups mozzarella cheese, shredded (part-skim)

Instructions

  1. Prepare the Vegetables: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Sauté garlic until fragrant, then add zucchini, eggplant, and bell pepper. Cook for 8-10 minutes until tender. Add spinach and cook until wilted. Season with Italian herbs, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
  2. Make the Cheese Mixture: In a bowl, combine ricotta, cottage cheese, egg, fresh basil, and half the Parmesan. Mix until smooth and well combined.
  3. Cook the Noodles: Prepare lasagna noodles according to package directions. Drain and set aside.
  4. Assemble the Lasagna: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Spread 1 cup marinara sauce in a 9x13 inch baking dish. Layer 3 noodles, half the cheese mixture, half the vegetable filling, 1/3 of the mozzarella, and 1 cup sauce. Repeat layers. Top with remaining 3 noodles, sauce, mozzarella, and Parmesan.
  5. Bake: Cover with foil and bake for 25 minutes. Remove foil and bake an additional 15 minutes until cheese is golden and bubbly.
  6. Rest and Serve: Let stand for 10 minutes before cutting. This helps the layers set for clean slices.

Chef's Tips

  • You can prepare this lasagna a day ahead and refrigerate. Add 10 minutes to baking time if cooking from cold.
  • For a vegan version, substitute ricotta with cashew cream and use plant-based mozzarella.
  • Freeze individual portions for quick healthy meals throughout the week.
  • Pair with a crisp green salad dressed with lemon vinaigrette for a complete meal.

seo.meta_description: Discover our healthy vegetable lasagna recipe with ricotta cheese, packed with fresh vegetables and whole wheat noodles. A nutritious comfort food that supports your wellness goals with 24g protein per serving.
